overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cinematic Western game (Red Dead Redemption 2), walking through the foggy streets of Saint Denis at golden hour. The player explores a muddy historic district with tram tracks, enters a quiet courtyard, and observes horse-drawn traffic passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy main street with tram tracks and historic storefronts

events.description: approaching and entering covered archway leading to interior courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy sidewalk past wooden benches and cast iron lamp posts

entered.detail: weathered yellow brick building with green trim and barred windows
simple wooden slatted bench on the sidewalk
ornate black cast iron street lamp with curved design
large painted wall advertisement for Jansen's on brick building
dark tunnel entrance leading to interior courtyard

segments.scene_description: Walking along a foggy, muddy cobblestone street lined with historic buildings and tram tracks. The camera passes a wooden bench and ornate lamp posts while approaching a covered archway. The golden morning sun creates dramatic backlighting through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed courtyard garden with spiral staircase

events.description: entering enclosed courtyard garden from the main street through brick archway
exiting courtyard through archway back to the main street

agents.ego_description: moving slowly through the quiet courtyard, observing the white spiral staircase and central garden planter

entered.detail: elegant white painted iron spiral staircase attached to building
large round concrete planter with red flowers in the courtyard center
tall palm tree with green fronds in a terracotta pot
tall red brick walls enclosing the courtyard on all sides

segments.scene_description: Inside a secluded courtyard featuring a white spiral staircase and a central stone planter with vibrant red flowers. Palm trees and lush vegetation contrast with the surrounding brick walls. The space is quiet and sheltered from the street, with soft diffused lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy main street with horse traffic and saloon storefronts

events.description: returning to main street from courtyard, emerging into brighter light
rider on tan horse passes by on the muddy street
horse-drawn carriage moves along the tram tracks

agents.ego_description: continuing down the covered sidewalk while observing passing horse traffic and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man riding a tan horse down the muddy street past the camera
horse-drawn carriage with driver moving along the tram tracks

entered.detail: two-story saloon with Jellies signage and iron balcony railings
painted building advertisement for Furniture Room and Undertaker
stacked wooden barrels and crates on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Back on the bustling main street with dramatic sunbeams cutting through the fog. A horse rider passes by, followed by pedestrians and a dog near wooden barrels. The camera walks along the covered sidewalk past saloon storefronts as a horse-drawn carriage moves along the tram tracks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a hazy, atmospheric street into a secluded garden sanctuary before returning to the bustling activity of a historic city. It begins by moving along a muddy cobblestone road lined with tram tracks and ornate lamp posts, where the golden morning sun creates dramatic backlighting through a thick fog. As the camera passes through a covered archway, the scene shifts into a quiet, sheltered courtyard featuring a white spiral staircase and vibrant red flowers nestled among lush palm trees. The perspective then transitions back onto the main street, where the diffused light opens up into sharp sunbeams cutting through the haze. Finally, the camera glides along a covered sidewalk past saloon storefronts, observing a horse rider, pedestrians, and a horse-drawn carriage navigating the foggy thoroughfare.
